header.title: Get in Touch with Our Team
header.subtitle: Have questions about our courses or need assistance? We're here to help you on your medical learning journey.

message.label: Message
message.placeholder: Tell us more about your inquiry...

items.question: How do I access my purchased courses?
items.answer: Once purchased, you can access your courses immediately by logging into your account and navigating to the 'My Learning' dashboard.

items.question: Do you offer certificates upon completion?
items.answer: Yes, all our courses include valid certificates of completion that you can download and share on your professional profiles.

items.question: Can I get a refund if I'm not satisfied?
items.answer: We offer a 30-day money-back guarantee. If you're not completely satisfied with the course content, contact our support team for a full refund.

items.question: Are new courses added regularly?
items.answer: Absolutely! We partner with top medical experts to launch new courses and update existing content every month.
